args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — Coordinate development initial phase (Deadline: 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is:

• Task: Coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.
• Deadline: 2024-05-20

Please complete the following specific deliverables by 2024-05-20:
1) Confirm a kickoff date/time with the development team and schedule the kickoff meeting (include meeting invite and agenda). 
2) Provide a list of developers assigned to the initial phase with roles/responsibilities. 
3) Share a brief initial project plan (1–2 pages or a slide) that includes the scope for the initial phase and the first-week milestones/deliverables. 
4) Identify any blockers, required resources, or decisions needed from product/management and note their impact on the start date.

Reply to this email when the kickoff is scheduled and attach the kickoff invite and the initial project plan.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — Email meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com (Deadline: 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is:

• Task: Email the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review.
• Deadline: 2024-05-21

Please complete the following specific steps by 2024-05-21:
1) Locate the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" in the shared drive (or attach it if you have a local copy).
2) Send an email to john.mitchell@gmail.com with the subject: "Review request: meeting-agenda-2024-05-15" and include the file as an attachment.
3) In the email body, request confirmation of receipt and ask for feedback by 2024-05-25.
4) Reply to me with a copy of the sent email or forward John’s response when received.

If you cannot find the file, tell me immediately and I’ll help locate it.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — Review sales projections (Deadline: 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is:

• Task: Review the sales projections and provide feedback.
• Deadline: 2024-05-19

Please complete the following specific deliverables by 2024-05-19:
1) Review the attached sales projections document (if you don't have it, request it from the sales lead and tell me).
2) Provide a written summary of your feedback (key assumptions, concerns, requested changes) — max 1 page.
3) Highlight any data discrepancies or assumptions that need validation and propose corrective actions.
4) If the projections are acceptable, provide a brief approval statement; if not, state required changes and timelines.

Reply to this email with your feedback attached.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
